title: Update column with or without parenthesis produce different results
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value INTEGER, status BOOLEAN DEFAULT 0);
UPDATE test_table SET status = (SELECT CASE WHEN value > 15 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM test_table AS T WHERE T.id = test_table.id);
key_bug_features: Different results from column update with or without parentheses
